creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Richard Scheffenegger from comment #99)
I asked because have never experienced such a panic on the systems I am maintaining, and since net.inet.tcp.rfc6675_pipe = 1 is set almost everywhere, so I was guessing that maybe it was a remedy.

Thank you for an exhaustive explanation of these intricacies.
